source_meaning: to have a large number of friends and guests
target_meaning: Literally, “to have wide feet”; to be a social butterfly, to know a lot of people

source_meaning: A visual pun, describing the characters that constitute the word 絕妙／绝妙 (juémiào), and hence used as a synonym of it.
target_meaning: synonym of 인의 장막 (in-ui jangmak, “all senses”)
